expected_findings.summary: 1 RSU vest lot(s) with basis near $0 — likely double-counted
expected_findings.detail: The W-2 has a Box 12 code V (RSU / NQSO income) and the 1099-B has same-day sale-to-cover lots with a cost basis near zero. RSU vest income is already included in W-2 Box 1 wages; the 1099-B lot cost basis should equal the Box 1 inclusion amount, not zero. Leaving the basis at zero double-counts the vest as both wage income and a capital gain. This is the single most common mechanically detectable error in the public TurboTax record — a $3,200 refund delta is in Intuit's own public record.
Foreign tax paid exceeds the election threshold for claiming the credit without Form 1116. Form 1116 is required and the credit may be limited.

expected_findings.summary: Jordan has up to $7,000 of TY2025 IRA headroom
expected_findings.detail: Jordan is 43 years old; the TY2025 IRA contribution limit is $7,000. Deductibility may phase out at high AGI for traditional IRA if covered by an employer plan; Roth IRA phases out at $236K–$246K MFJ.

expected_findings.summary: Avery has up to $7,000 of TY2025 IRA headroom
expected_findings.detail: Avery is 43 years old; the TY2025 IRA contribution limit is $7,000. Deductibility may phase out at high AGI for traditional IRA if covered by an employer plan; Roth IRA phases out at $236K–$246K MFJ.

expected_findings.summary: AGI above Roth IRA phaseout — consider backdoor Roth
expected_findings.detail: AGI $285,400 is above the single Roth IRA phaseout ceiling ($165,000). Direct Roth contributions are not allowed. Consider the backdoor Roth strategy (nondeductible traditional IRA contribution + Roth conversion) if there is no pre-tax IRA balance to trigger pro-rata.
Jordan has contributed $14,000 toward the TY2025 §402(g) limit of $23,500. Another $9,500 can still be deferred before year end.
Avery has contributed $6,000 toward the TY2025 §402(g) limit of $23,500. Another $17,500 can still be deferred before year end.

expected_findings.summary: Compute AMT foreign tax credit separately on Form 1116
expected_findings.detail: At high income with foreign tax paid, AMT requires a parallel Form 1116 using AMT sourcing rules under §59(a). The regular FTC and AMT FTC are often different.

expected_findings.summary: Need $46,235 withheld to hit 90% current year safe harbor
expected_findings.detail: The alternative safe harbor is 90% of current year tax. This is usually only easier to hit than 110% prior year if income dropped.
